# Secukinumab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Secukinumab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Secukinumab</strong> 目前有 <strong>20 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Secukinumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Plaque psoriasis Cosentyx is indicated for the treatment of moderate to severe plaque psoriasis in adults and children from the age of 6 years old who are candidates for systemic therapy....</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>primary release disorder of platelets（98.2%）</li>
<li>pseudo-von Willebrand disease（97.7%）</li>
<li>Glanzmann thrombasthenia（97.3%）</li>
<li>HER2 positive breast carcinoma（96.5%）</li>
<li>drug-induced osteoporosis（95.3%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor positive breast cancer（95.1%）</li>
<li>normal breast-like subtype of breast carcinoma（95.1%）</li>
<li>breast tumor luminal A or B（95.0%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor negative breast cancer（94.5%）</li>
<li>fetal and neonatal alloimmune thrombocytopenia（92.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/secukinumab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
